news.title: Microsoft Stock Defies Tech Slump as Its Biggest Weakness Becomes Its Strength
news.summary: Microsoft stock is having a terrible year but it’s starting to get a boost for an unlikely reason.  The shares started the second half of the year well, rising 3% Wednesday and pointing higher again in premarket trading Thursday.  The iShares Expanded Tech-Software exchange-traded fund,  has climbed for four consecutive days through Wednesday–and was pointing higher again ahead of the open Thursday.
